description:
Standardize IT runbooks by creating custom editor snippets and updating draft documentation. Create two snippet tiddlers tagged '$:/tags/TextEditor/Snippet': 'Snippet: Critical Warning' with body text "@@.tc-error
''CRITICAL:'' Ensure all databases are backed up and snapshot verified before proceeding.
@@" and 'Snippet: Info Box' with body text "@@.tc-message-box
''INFO:'' Execution of this runbook must be logged in the #ops-deployments Slack channel.
@@". Update the runbooks 'PostgreSQL 16 Minor Upgrade', 'Nginx SSL Certificate Rotation', and 'Kubernetes Node Draining' by replacing the placeholders '[INSERT CRITICAL WARNING]' and '[INSERT INFO BOX]' with the respective snippet content. For each updated runbook, replace the 'Draft Runbook' tag with 'Published Runbook'.
